## What

Describe the change.

## Why

What problem does it solve? Link related issues (e.g. `Fixes #12`).

## How tested

- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` passes
- [ ] Other relevant suites pass (`test:restore` / `test:external` / `test:rename`)
- [ ] Manually verified on: [Windows / macOS / Linux]

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay attention to (breaking changes, follow-ups, screenshots).
